heading: Boolarra vs Boole Poole — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boolarra, Victoria and Boole Poole, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolarra has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Boole Poole (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boolarra or Boole Poole safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boolarra has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Boole Poole scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boolarra scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Boole Poole scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boolarra or Boole Poole?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
